[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100011010 4
1 111100111 7
2 001011100 4
3 101111111 8
4 010000111 4
5 111010100 5
6 110001000 3
7 110001111 6

01 10 111011100 6
12 21 110001111 6 match 7
23 32 110011111 7
34 43 111111111 a

67 76 111111111 a
70 07 111010111 7

13 31 110011010 5
